q: Every one of us is the sum total of his own thoughts.

h:

q: The scariest moment is always just before you start. After that, things can only get better.

q: The less you want, the richer you are. The more you need in order to be happy, the more miserable you'll be.

q: You cannot always control what goes on outside. But you can always control what goes on inside.

q: Judgments prevent us from seeing the good that lies beyond appearances.

h:

q: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty. Anyone who keeps learning stays young.

h:

q: At first dreams seem impossible, then improbable, then inevitable.
h:
“At first dreams seem impossible, then improbable, then inevitable.” —
Christopher Reeve

q: The friend is the man who knows all about you, and still likes you.
h:
“The friend is the man who knows all about you, and still likes you.” —
Elbert Hubbard

q: Today is the oldest you've ever been, and the youngest you'll ever be again.
h:
“Today is the oldest you've ever been, and the youngest you'll ever be again.” —
Eleanor Roosevelt

q: Many people spend more time looking at their failures than focusing on their successes.
h:
“Many people spend more time looking at their failures than focusing on their successes.” —
Lolly Daskal

q: Failure is a prerequisite for great success. If you want success faster, double your rate of failure.
h:
“Failure is a prerequisite for great success. If you want success faster, double your rate of failure.” —
Brian Tracy

q: If you go out looking for friends, you're going to find they are very scarce. If you go out to be a friend, you'll find them everywhere.
h:
“If you go out looking for friends, you're going to find they are very scarce. If you go out to be a friend, you'll find them everywhere.” —
Zig Ziglar

q: There are no ordinary moments.
h:
“There are no ordinary moments.” —
Dan Millman

q: If you quit once it becomes a habit.
h:
“If you quit once it becomes a habit.” —
Michael Jordan

q: The essence of the Way is detachment.
h:

Bodhidharma

q: If you read a lot of books, you're considered well-read. But if you watch a lot of TV, you're not considered well-viewed.
h:
“If you read a lot of books, you're considered well-read. But if you watch a lot of TV, you're not considered well-viewed.” —
Lily Tomlin

q: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
h:
“Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.” —
Soren Kierkegaard

q: Leaders spend 5% of their time on the problem & 95% of their time on the solution. Get over it & crush it!
h:
“Leaders spend 5% of their time on the problem & 95% of their time on the solution. Get over it & crush it!” —
Tony Robbins

q: So long as we are being remembered, we remain alive.
h:
“So long as we are being remembered, we remain alive.” —
Carlos Ruiz Zafon

q: Distant water does not put out a nearby fire.
h:
“Distant water does not put out a nearby fire.” —
Chinese Proverb

q: Walk slowly but never walk backward.
h:
“Walk slowly but never walk backward.” —
Unknown

q: When at last you are come to the ocean of happiness, do not go back thirsty.
h:
“When at last you are come to the ocean of happiness, do not go back thirsty.” —
Kabir

q: In order to be walked over, you have to be lying down.
h:
“In order to be walked over, you have to be lying down.” —

q: Deliberately seek the company of people who influence you to think and act on building the life you desire.
h:
“Deliberately seek the company of people who influence you to think and act on building the life you desire.” —
Napoleon Hill

q: Why live an ordinary life, when you can live an extraordinary one.
h:
“Why live an ordinary life, when you can live an extraordinary one.” —
Tony Robbins

q: It's your outlook on life that counts.
h:
“It's your outlook on life that counts.” —
Betty White

q: You gain strength, courage and confidence by every experience in which you really stop to look fear in the face.
h:
“You gain strength, courage and confidence by every experience in which you really stop to look fear in the face.” —
Eleanor Roosevelt

q: Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
h:
“Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.” —

q: Go and do the things you can't. That is how you get to do them.
h:
“Go and do the things you can't. That is how you get to do them.” —

q: When you repeat a mistake, it is not a mistake anymore: it is a decision.
h:

q: It is in changing that we find purpose.
h:

q: In all chaos there is a cosmos, in all disorder a secret order.
h:
“In all chaos there is a cosmos, in all disorder a secret order.” —
Carl Jung

q: You can put lipstick on a pig. It's still a pig.
h:
“You can put lipstick on a pig. It's still a pig.” —

q: One loses many laughs by not laughing at oneself.
h:
“One loses many laughs by not laughing at oneself.” —

q: Life is ten percent what you experience and ninety percent how you respond to it.
h:

Unknown

q: Plants grow weak without wind.
h:

q: You can't climb the ladder of success with your hands in your pockets.

q: If you're brave enough to say goodbye, life will reward you with a new hello.
h:

q: Realize deeply that the present moment is all you have. Make the NOW the primary focus of your life.
h:

q: If you can't imagine it, you can't have it.
h:

q: He who permits himself to tell a lie once, finds it much easier to do it the second time.
h:
“He who permits himself to tell a lie once, finds it much easier to do it the second time.” —

q: I'd rather welcome change than cling to the past.
h:
“I'd rather welcome change than cling to the past.” —

q: In matters of style, swim with the current; in matters of principle, stand like a rock.
h:
“In matters of style, swim with the current; in matters of principle, stand like a rock.” —
Thomas Jefferson

q: If you want to make God laugh, tell him about your plans.
h:
“If you want to make God laugh, tell him about your plans.” —

q: He who fails to plan, plans to fail.
h:
“He who fails to plan, plans to fail.” —
Unknown

q: There is a wisdom of the head, and there is a wisdom of the heart.
h:

q: Challenge yourself to find the good and beautiful thing inside of everyone.
h:
“Challenge yourself to find the good and beautiful thing inside of everyone.” —

q: Do Something. If it works, do more of it. If it doesn't, do something else.
h:

q: When you realize you've made a mistake, take immediate steps to correct it.
h:
“When you realize you've made a mistake, take immediate steps to correct it.” —

q: Only to the extent that we expose ourselves over and over to annihilation can that which is indestructible in us be found.
h:

q: The scariest monsters are the ones that lurk within our souls.
h:

q: You can't have anything worthwhile without difficulties.

q: When you say yes to change, you are choosing to navigate that path peacefully and happily and see where it takes you.
h:

q: Stand up to your obstacles and do something about them. You'll find they haven't half the strength you think they have.
h:

Norman Vincent Peale

q: Be curious, not judgmental.
h:

q: All human beings can alter their lives by altering their attitudes.
h:

q: When the mind is calm, how quickly, how smoothly, how beautifully you will perceive everything.

q: It is better to fail in originality than to succeed in imitation.
h:

q: Keep your eyes on the goal, and just keep taking the next step towards completing it.
h:

q: To achieve, you need thought. You have to know what you are doing and that's real power.
h:

q: When you win, say nothing, when you lose say less.
h:

q: Happiness is a quality of the soul...not a function of one's material circumstances.
h:

q: Whatever you do, strive to do it so well that no man living and no man dead and no man yet to be born could do it any better.
h:

Benjamin Mays

q: Failure is an option here. If things are not failing, you are not innovating enough.
h:

q: Fear does not have any special power unless you empower it by submitting to it.

q: Life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
h:
“Life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.” —

q: If you are not living each day with excitement, energy, and passion, then you are not living true to your life purpose.
h:

q: Tradition is the illusion of permanence.
h:

q: Before anything else, preparation is the key to success.

q: Life is simply what our feelings do to us.
h:

q: The one who praises you is a thief. The one who criticizes you is your true friend.
h:

q: Having an open mind is one of the most important qualities we can possess. Once our minds close, we stop evolving.

Yanni

q: To be of use to the world is the only way to be happy.
h:

q: All power is from within and therefore under our control.
h:

q: There are no limitations to the mind except those we acknowledge...
h:

q: It's not whether you get knocked down, its whether you get back up.
h:
“It's not whether you get knocked down, its whether you get back up.” —

q: If you've never eaten while crying you don t know what life tastes like.
h:

q: No matter who you are, we're creatures of habit. The better your habits are, the better they will be in pressure situations.

q: It always started with a dream.

q: Where violence reigns, reason is weak.
h:

q: The only difference between success and failure is the ability to take action.

q: It is under the greatest adversity that there exists the greatest potential for doing good, both for oneself and others.
h:

q: When you are totally at peace with yourself, nothing can shake you.
h:

q: Don't seek, don't avoid, don't expect. Take what comes and be happy.
h:

q: To think is easy. To act is hard. But the hardest thing in the world is to act in accordance with your thinking.

q: Whatever you do in life, surround yourself with smart people who'll argue with you.

q: You don't have to control your thoughts; you just have to stop letting them control you.
h:

q: Enthusiasm is a vital element toward the individual success of every man or woman.

q: Most people dabble their way through life, never deciding to master anything in particular.
h:

q: Every saint has a past, and every sinner has a future.
h:

q: The best way to predict your future is to create it.
h:
“The best way to predict your future is to create it.” —

q: Loyalty and devotion lead to bravery. Bravery leads to the spirit of self-sacrifice. The spirit of self-sacrifice creates trust in the power of love.

q: It is in the darkness that one finds the light.

q: Society is composed of two great classes those who have more dinners than appetite, and those who have more appetite than dinners.
h:

q: You can't get to a place that you don't believe exists.
h:

Unknown

q: The greatest treasures are those invisible to the eye but found by the heart.
h:
“The greatest treasures are those invisible to the eye but found by the heart.” —

q: I am not absentminded. It is the presence of mind that makes me unaware of everything else.
h:

q: The world is a puzzle; no need to make sense out of it.
h:

q: Success is not the result of making money; making money is the result of success - and success is in direct proportion to our service.
h:
